name: Uni Indoor Golf
address: 7023 Little River Turnpike Suite# LL40, Annandale, VA 22003
about: Uni Indoor Golf is a training studio focused on personalized golf instruction using state-of-the-art HD screen golf technology. The facility offers private and semi-private lessons in one-hour blocks, with packages available for golfers of all skill levels. Lessons include video swing analysis and are designed to help students understand the relationship between club movement and body mechanics. The studio is equipped with golf simulator technology that provides detailed swing and ball control feedback.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized lesson plans tailored to individual skill sets
State-of-the-art HD screen golf simulator technology
Detailed swing analysis with video feedback
Flexible lesson packages for various budgets
Instructor with collegiate and professional tour experience

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are expected to bring their own equipment for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink services are mentioned, though BYOB might be allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required for 18 holes isn't specified, but playing lessons are available by request.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Uni Indoor Golf offers lessons for golfers of all ages and abilities, including juniors.
